name: Old-Fashioned Chocolate Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
2. Butter a 1 1/2 or 2 quart baking dish.
3. Break the chocolate into bits and melt in the scalded milk, stirring until smooth.
4. Add the bread crumbs and set aside to cool.
5. When lukewarm, add the remaining ingredients (eggs, sugar, butter, salt, vanilla).
6. Mix well and pour into the prepared dish.
7. Bake for about 50 minutes or until set.
8. Serve with real whipped cream.
